sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Disney FY2026 Q1 매출 260억 달러(+5%), Experiences 부문 분기 역대 최고 매출 100억 달러

keyPoints.text: FY2026 1분기 매출 260억 달러로 전년 동기 247억 달러 대비 5% 증가, 세전이익 37억 달러로 전년과 유사 수준 유지
Experiences 부문 분기 역대 최고 매출 100억 달러, 세그먼트 영업이익 33억 달러 달성
총 세그먼트 영업이익 46억 달러로 전년 동기 51억 달러 대비 9% 감소, SVOD 수익성 개선은 긍정적

riskChanges.text: YouTube TV 임시 중단으로 세그먼트 영업이익에 약 1억 1,000만 달러 부정적 영향

businessChanges.text: SVOD 영업이익 4억 5,000만 달러(전년 대비 1억 8,900만 달러 증가), SVOD 영업이익률 8.4%로 개선
국내 파크&익스피리언스 영업이익 8% 성장, 입장객 수 1% 증가 및 1인당 지출 4% 증가
Q2 전망: SVOD 영업이익 약 5억 달러 목표로 전년 동기 대비 약 2억 달러 증가 예상

financialHighlights.text: 매출 260억 달러(전년 247억 달러 대비 5% 증가), 세전이익 37억 달러
총 세그먼트 영업이익 46억 달러(전년 51억 달러 대비 9% 감소), GAAP 희석 EPS 1.34달러(전년 1.40달러)
Experiences 부문 매출 100억 달러, 영업이익 33억 달러로 분기 역대 최고 기록
Entertainment 세그먼트 영업이익 6억 달러에서 11억 달러로 증가, 영업이익률 9.5% 달성

watchItems.text: 총 세그먼트 영업이익이 9% 감소한 상황에서 하반기 이익 회복 여부 모니터링 필요
SVOD 영업이익 개선 추세 지속 여부 및 Q2 5억 달러 목표 달성 가능성

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 fy2026_q1xprxex991.htm PRESS RELEASE Document FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Exhibit 99.1 February 2, 2026 THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY REPORTS FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS FOR FISCAL 2026 BURBANK, Calif. – The Walt Disney Company today reported earnings for its first quarter ended December 27, 2025. Financial Results for the Quarter: • Revenues increased 5% for the quarter to $26.0 billion from $24.7 billion in Q1 fiscal 2025. • Income before income taxes for Q1 of $3.7 billion was comparable to Q1 fiscal 2025. • Total segment operating income (1) decreased 9% for the quarter to $4.6 billion from $5.1 billion in Q1 fiscal 2025. • Diluted earnings per share (EPS) for Q1 decreased to $1.34 from $1.40 in Q1 fiscal 20  Normalized numeric aliases: $26.0 billion = 260억 달러; $24.7 billion = 247억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $5.1 billion = 51억 달러; $26.0 = 26.0달러; $24.7 = 24.7달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러; $5.1 = 5.1달러; $4.6 = 4.6달러; $1.34 = 1.34달러; $1.40 = 1.40달러; $1.63 = 1.63달러; $1.76 = 1.76달러.

$0.6 billion to $1.1 billion, resulting in Entertainment segment operating margin of 9.5%, as higher programming and production and marketing costs in the quarter more than offset an increase in subscription and affiliate fees and higher theatrical revenue ◦ SVOD (2) revenue increased 11% compared to Q1 fiscal 2025 (growth reflects a 1 ppt adverse impact from the inclusion of Star India revenue in the prior-year quarter). SVOD operating income (3) increased $189 million to $450 million, resulting in SVOD operating margin (3) of 8.4% ◦ Segment advertising revenue decreased 6% compared to Q1 fiscal 2025, and reflects a net adverse impact of 11 ppts from the inclusion of Star India and higher political advertising in Q1 fisca  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.6 billion = 6억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $189 million = 1억 8,900만 달러; $450 million = 4억 5,000만 달러; $191 million = 1억 9,100만 달러; $56 million = 5,600만 달러; $0.6 = 0.6달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $450 = 450달러; $189 = 189달러; $191 = 191달러; $56 = 56달러.

more than offset by higher programming and production costs and a decrease in subscription and affiliate fees ◦ Temporary suspension of YouTube TV carriage had an adverse impact to segment operating income of approximately $110 million • Experiences: Record quarterly revenue of $10.0 billion and segment OI of $3.3 billion ◦ Domestic Parks & Experiences OI growth of 8% ◦ Attendance at our domestic parks was up 1% in the quarter, and per capita spending was up 4% (1) Total segment operating income and diluted EPS excluding certain items (also referred to as adjusted EPS) are non-GAAP financial measures. The most comparable GAAP measures are income before income taxes and diluted EPS, respectively. See the discussion on pages 13 through 16 for how we define and calculate these measures and a reconciliation thereof to the most directly compar  Normalized numeric aliases: $110 million = 1억 1,000만 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $110 = 110달러; $10.0 = 10.0달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러.

video-on-demand and Disney+ Hotstar (through November 14, 2024) streaming services (excluding Hulu Live TV and Fubo vMVPD services), collectively referred to as “Entertainment SVOD” or “SVOD” (3) Entertainment SVOD operating income (also referred to as SVOD operating income) and SVOD operating margin are non-GAAP financial measures. The most comparable GAAP measures are Entertainment segment operating income and Entertainment segment operating margin. See the discussion on pages 13 through 16 for how we define and calculate these measures and a reconciliation thereof to the most directly comparable GAAP measures. 1 Guidance and Outlook : • Q2 Fiscal 2026: ◦ Entertainment: ▪ Segment OI comparable to Q2 fiscal 2025 ▪ SVOD operating income (1) of approximately $500 million, an increase of approximately $200 million compared to Q2 fiscal 2025 ◦ Sports (2) : ▪ Comparable revenue to Q2  Normalized numeric aliases: $500 million = 5억 달러; $200 million = 2억 달러; $500 = 500달러; $200 = 200달러.
